cases.judge_reason: The agent explicitly states the return window is 30 days from the delivery date, satisfying the criteria.
cases.response: You have 30 days from the delivery date to start a return, and items need to be unworn and unused with original tags attached and original packaging included — items showing wear, wash, or outdoor use can't be accepted [policy-returns-return-window].

cases.judge_reason: The agent's response explicitly states that once the returned item is received and inspected, the refund will be issued to the original payment method within 5 to 7 business days, fully satisfying the criteria.
cases.response: Once we receive and inspect your returned item, your refund will be issued to your original payment method within 5 to 7 business days, and you'll get a confirmation email when it's processed [policy-returns-refunds]. Just keep in mind that original shipping fees aren't refunded unless the return was due to an error on our part [policy-returns-refunds].

cases.judge_reason: The response explicitly states the $7.50 USD flat fee for the prepaid return label and states that this fee is waived if the item arrived damaged, defective, or not as ordered, satisfying both parts of the criteria.
cases.response: Yes, if you use our prepaid return label there's a flat 7.50 USD fee deducted from your refund, but that fee is waived if the item arrived damaged, defective, or not as ordered [policy-returns-return-shipping-cost]. Note that this prepaid label applies to US orders, as Canadian customers ship returns at their own cost to our Denver warehouse [policy-returns-how-to-start-a-return].

cases.judge_reason: The agent's response explicitly states that standard shipping is free on orders over 75 USD, satisfying the criterion.
cases.response: Standard shipping is free on orders over 75 USD, otherwise it's 6.95 USD [policy-shipping-domestic-shipping-options].

cases.judge_reason: The agent's response explicitly states expedited shipping costs $14.95 USD and arrives in 2 business days, matching the criteria exactly.
cases.response: Expedited shipping costs 14.95 USD and arrives in 2 business days [policy-shipping-domestic-shipping-options].

cases.judge_reason: The agent correctly states that international shipping is currently limited to Canada, implying domestic US shipping as the base, and confirms India is not available. It does not promise India shipping, satisfying the criteria.
cases.response: We currently only ship internationally to Canada, so unfortunately we don't offer shipping to India at this time [policy-shipping-international-shipping]. If you'd like more information or to check on future shipping options, please reach out to support@auroraoutfitters.com.

cases.judge_reason: The agent response states the gear comes with a 1-year warranty against manufacturing defects starting from delivery date, and explicitly notes that normal wear and tear, misuse, and accident damage are not covered, satisfying both parts of the criteria.
cases.response: Yes, Aurora Outfitters brand gear comes with a 1-year warranty against manufacturing defects, starting from the date of delivery. Note that normal wear and tear, misuse, and accident damage aren't covered. To file a warranty claim, you'd follow the same photo submission process used for damaged items [policy-returns-warranty].

cases.judge_reason: The agent explains the price adjustment policy: refund within 14 days of purchase, once per order, credited to the original payment method, matching the criteria.
cases.response: Yes, as long as your purchase was within the last 14 days, we can refund the difference to your original payment method, once per order [policy-faq-price-adjustments]. This does not apply if the item is marked FINAL SALE or if the discount is from a different sale event than the one you bought under [policy-faq-price-adjustments]. If you meet those conditions, reach out to support@auroraoutfitters.com with your order details so they can process the adjustment.

cases.judge_reason: The agent explicitly states 'gift cards never expire', satisfying the criteria.
cases.response: No, gift cards never expire and carry no fees [policy-faq-gift-cards].

cases.judge_reason: The agent response includes the support email address (support@auroraoutfitters.com) and states the hours as Monday through Friday, 8 am to 5 pm Mountain Time, satisfying both parts of the criteria.
cases.response: You can reach us by emailing support@auroraoutfitters.com, and it's best to include your order number so we can help you faster. Our team is available Monday through Friday, 8 am to 5 pm Mountain Time, and we respond to every message within 1 business day [policy-faq-contacting-support].

cases.judge_reason: The response recommends the Stormline Rain Jacket and describes it as waterproof. It mentions taped seams, pit zips, and packable features consistent with the catalog description. It does not contradict the 2.5-layer shell detail (doesn't mention layer count explicitly, just calls it a 'breathable shell'), and includes plausible additional specs (rating, hood, price, sizes) without claiming inaccuracies relative to the given criteria.
cases.response: Yes, the Stormline Rain Jacket is a great option for hiking. It's a waterproof breathable shell rated 10,000 mm / 10,000 g with fully taped seams, an adjustable storm hood, and pit zips for venting on climbs, and it packs into its own chest pocket for easy carrying [stormline-rain-jacket]. It's priced at 179.99 USD and currently in stock in sizes S, M, L, and XL [stormline-rain-jacket].
The Stormline Rain Jacket is 179.99 USD, and that price is the same across all sizes: S, M, L, and XL [stormline-rain-jacket].

cases.judge_reason: The agent explicitly confirms the Stormline Rain Jacket is available in size M, stating it is in stock (13 units), satisfying the criteria.
cases.response: Yes, the Stormline Rain Jacket comes in size M at 179.99 USD, and there are 13 in stock [stormline-rain-jacket].

cases.judge_reason: The response states the snowboard is 'currently unavailable in its Standard variant,' mentions the waitlist option, and does not claim it can be purchased right now.
cases.response: The Out of Stock Snowboard is currently unavailable in its Standard variant. It's our most popular powder shape, so restocks tend to sell through fast, and you can join the waitlist to be notified when it's back [the-out-of-stock-snowboard].

cases.judge_reason: The agent recommends the Summit Ridge 2-Person Tent with specific details (freestanding three-season design, pitch time, fly material/coating, two doors/vestibules, weight, colors, price, stock status) and cites the source consistently, matching the criteria of recommending this tent with catalog-consistent details.
cases.response: For two people, the Summit Ridge 2-Person Tent is a great option. It's a freestanding three-season tent that pitches in under ten minutes, with a 20D ripstop fly carrying a 3000 mm waterproof coating and fully taped seams. It has two doors and matching vestibules, so neither camper has to climb over the other during the night, and it packs down to just 2.1 kg, splittable between two hikers [summit-ridge-2-person-tent]. It's available in Forest Green and Burnt Orange, both priced at 289.99 USD and currently in stock [summit-ridge-2-person-tent].

cases.judge_reason: The response mentions the Ember 750 Sleeping Bag and states its 15 F comfort limit, satisfying the criteria.
cases.response: We carry the Ember 750 Sleeping Bag, a 750-fill down mummy bag rated to a 15 F comfort limit, weighing just 860 g. It features a full-length draft tube and a snag-free zipper guard to help retain warmth, and comes with both a compression sack for the trail and a loose storage sack for home use. It's available in Regular and Long sizes, both priced at 249.99 USD [ember-750-sleeping-bag].

cases.judge_reason: The agent recommends the Glacier Point Down Parka and includes matching catalog details: 700-fill down insulation and comfortable use down to about -15 C when layered, consistent with the stated criteria.
cases.response: The Glacier Point Down Parka is built for that: it uses 700-fill responsibly sourced down with a DWR-treated shell, an insulated hood, interior stash pockets, and a two-way front zip, and it's comfortable standing around camp down to about -15 C when layered [glacier-point-down-parka]. It's priced at 329.99 USD and currently in stock in M, L, and XL [glacier-point-down-parka]. If you also need something waterproof for active movement in wet conditions, the Stormline Rain Jacket is a lighter shell option, though it's not insulated like the parka [stormline-rain-jacket].
Yes, we carry the Ridgeline Trekking Poles for 89.95 USD. They're telescoping aluminum poles with cork grips and carbide tips, weighing 245 g per pole (sold as a pair) [ridgeline-trekking-poles].

cases.judge_reason: The response confirms gift cards are available for purchase and explicitly states they are delivered digitally by email. It does not claim they are out of stock or unavailable, satisfying the criteria.
cases.response: Yes, gift cards are available and delivered digitally by email, usually within minutes of purchase. You can choose from 10, 25, 50, or 100 USD denominations, and they never expire and carry no fees, so your brother can use it across multiple orders whenever he likes [policy-faq-gift-cards]. Just keep in mind gift cards cannot be refunded or exchanged for cash once purchased [policy-faq-gift-cards].
